summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Solar Plant Management System (ON Soluções Energéticas). All major functionality working correctly with Portuguese localization and professional design implementation.
passed_tests: API Health Check - All endpoints responding correctly
User Authentication - Login/Register with JWT tokens working
Dashboard Stats - KPIs and metrics loading correctly
CRUD Operations - Clients, Plants, Consumer Units full lifecycle
Report Generation - Complete report data with charts and tables
Frontend Navigation - All sidebar navigation working
Portuguese Localization - All UI text in Portuguese (pt-BR)
User Registration - New user creation and authentication flow
Dashboard Visualization - Charts, KPIs, alerts properly displayed
Sample Data Integration - 'Bananas Portão' client and 'USINA FV' plant working
Responsive Design - Proper layout and yellow/black branding
Report Preview - Professional PDF-ready report with all sections
Consumer Units Management - Generator/Beneficiary units display
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (26/26 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (14/15 major features tested successfully)
